---
title: "Personal Writings"
listing:
  contents: personal-writings
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  image-align: right
  max-description-length: 175
  date-format: medium
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
In this section, I share my monthly articles published at [Manifold](https://www.manifold.press/), a Turkish online magazine on design, technology, art and everyday life. I cover the topics in the intersection of artificial intelligence and different areas, mostly in digital humanities, linguistics by aiming to make them understandable by a general audience.

\ \
